constraints.definition: CHECK ((((attachment_json IS NULL) AND (claim_status = 'NONE'::"PlayerNotificationClaimStatus")) OR ((attachment_json IS NOT NULL) AND (claim_status = ANY (ARRAY['UNCLAIMED'::"PlayerNotificationClaimStatus", 'CLAIMED'::"PlayerNotificationClaimStatus", 'EXPIRED'::"PlayerNotificationClaimStatus"])))))

CHECK ((((spirit_definition_id IS NULL) AND (element IS NULL) AND (is_main = false) AND (current_hp = 0) AND (max_hp = 0)) OR ((spirit_definition_id IS NOT NULL) AND (element IS NOT NULL) AND (max_hp > 0))))
FOREIGN KEY (player_id) REFERENCES player(id) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE
FOREIGN KEY (run_id) REFERENCES robot_test_run(id) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE
FOREIGN KEY (player_id) REFERENCES player(id) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE
FOREIGN KEY (run_id) REFERENCES robot_test_run(id) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE
